title: Design Landing Page Layout
description: Create the structure and layout for the new landing page, ensuring it aligns with the project’s global layout and styling guidelines.
details: Implement a new React component (e.g., LandingPage.tsx) under the appropriate pages directory (e.g., pages/index.tsx or pages/landing.tsx, depending on routing requirements). The layout should include a prominent header (site logo/title), a brief description of the agent-ui playground, and a clear call-to-action (e.g., 'Start Chatting'). Ensure the layout is responsive and accessible, following WCAG 2.1 AA standards. Use existing global styles from globals.css and layout.tsx for consistency.
test_strategy: Verify the landing page renders correctly on desktop and mobile devices. Check that all elements are accessible via keyboard and have appropriate ARIA labels. Use browser dev tools to confirm responsive behavior and adherence to global styles.

title: Implement Navigation from Landing Page to Chat Playground
description: Add navigation logic to allow users to proceed from the landing page to the main chat playground (e.g., via a button or link).
details: Add a clear, visually distinct button (e.g., 'Start Chatting') that navigates users to the core chat playground route ('/'). Use Next.js Link component for client-side navigation. Ensure the button is accessible and focusable. If the landing page replaces the root route, ensure navigation logic is updated accordingly.
test_strategy: Test that clicking the call-to-action navigates to the chat playground without a full page reload. Confirm navigation works with keyboard and screen reader. Ensure focus management is correct after navigation.

title: Integrate Landing Page with Global Layout and Styling
description: Ensure the new landing page is wrapped with the global layout and uses consistent styling as defined in layout.tsx and globals.css.
details: Import and use the global layout component (layout.tsx) to wrap the landing page. Apply global CSS classes for typography, spacing, and color. Confirm that the landing page header, description, and call-to-action match the visual style of the rest of the application. Address any style collisions or overrides as needed.
test_strategy: Visually inspect the landing page for consistency with other pages. Use browser dev tools to confirm global styles are applied. Check for any style conflicts or layout issues.

title: Add Accessibility and SEO Enhancements
description: Enhance the landing page for accessibility and basic SEO, including semantic HTML, ARIA attributes, and meta tags.

test_strategy: Run accessibility audits using browser tools (e.g., Lighthouse, axe). Validate keyboard navigation and screen reader compatibility. Check that meta tags are present in the page source.
